heading: Purchases through the General Services Administration
label: 106 Purchases through the General Services Administration
text: On and after , the American Printing House for the Blind is authorized to make purchases through the General Services Administration.September 8, 1978
notes: CodificationSection is from the Second Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1978, and contained additional provisions relating to purchases by Howard University, Gallaudet University, and the National Technical Institute for the Deaf, which are set out in sections 130 and 4362 of this title.
